member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.BinaryHeap
member.summary: Binary min-heap for A* open set. Deterministic ordering per NAVIGATION_SPEC.md section 5.1.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.BinaryHeap.CompareEntries(HumanFortress.Navigation.HeapEntry,HumanFortress.Navigation.HeapEntry)
member.summary: Compare entries using deterministic tie-breakers. Per NAVIGATION_SPEC.md section 5.1: 1. Smaller f = g + h 2. Smaller h 3. Smaller g 4. Smaller LocalIndex (row-major; 0..1023)

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.HeapEntry
member.summary: Entry in the A* open set heap.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.ChunkNavData
member.summary: Per-chunk navigation data per NAVIGATION_SPEC.md section 2. Rebuilt during RebuildDerived phase in UPDATE_ORDER.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.ChunkNavData.NavMask
member.summary: Navigation capability mask for each tile. Index = y * 32 + x.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.ChunkNavData.NavCost
member.summary: Movement cost for each tile. Base cost + traffic + fluid + surface adjustments.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.ChunkNavData.UpRampMask
member.summary: Per-tile mask of allowed ascend directions for ramps. Bits 0..7 correspond to N,NE,E,SE,S,SW,W,NW. 0 = no ascend from this tile.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.ChunkNavData.ConnectivityVersion
member.summary: Connectivity version for cache invalidation. Bumped when topology changes.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.ChunkNavData.RebuildFromTiles(HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TileBase[],HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationTuning)
member.summary: Rebuild navigation data from tile information. Called during RebuildDerived phase.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.ChunkNavData.HasCapability(System.Int32,HumanFortress.Navigation.NavCapability)
member.summary: Check if a tile has specific capability.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.ChunkNavData.GetCost(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get movement cost for a tile.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.DeterministicAStar
member.summary: Deterministic A* pathfinder per NAVIGATION_SPEC.md section 5. Uses binary heap with stable ordering.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.DeterministicAStar.FindPath(HumanFortress.Navigation.PathRequest,HumanFortress.Navigation.IWorldNavigationView)
member.summary: Find path from source to destination.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.IWorldNavigationView
member.summary: Read-only view of world navigation data for pathfinding. Provides access to navigation masks and costs across chunks.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.IWorldNavigationView.IsValid(HumanFortress.Navigation.Point3)
member.summary: Check if a position is valid in the world.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.IWorldNavigationView.GetCapabilities(HumanFortress.Navigation.Point3)
member.summary: Get navigation capabilities at a position.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.IWorldNavigationView.GetCost(HumanFortress.Navigation.Point3)
member.summary: Get movement cost at a position.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.IWorldNavigationView.IsWalkable(HumanFortress.Navigation.Point3,HumanFortress.Navigation.MoveMode)
member.summary: Check if a position is walkable with given mode.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.IWorldNavigationView.HasStairsUp(HumanFortress.Navigation.Point3)
member.summary: Check if position has stairs up.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.IWorldNavigationView.HasStairsDown(HumanFortress.Navigation.Point3)
member.summary: Check if position has stairs down.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.IWorldNavigationView.GetConnectivityVersion(HumanFortress.Navigation.ChunkKey)
member.summary: Get connectivity version for a chunk.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.MovementExecutor
member.summary: Handles movement execution along paths with stuck detection. Per NAVIGATION_SPEC.md section 7.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.MovementExecutor.BeginMovement(System.UInt32,HumanFortress.Navigation.PathRequest,HumanFortress.Navigation.Path)
member.summary: Start or update movement for an entity.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.MovementExecutor.UpdateMovement(System.UInt32,HumanFortress.Navigation.IWorldNavigationView)
member.summary: Update movement for all entities. Called during movement system update.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.MovementExecutor.HasMovement(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Check if entity has active movement.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.MovementExecutor.GetProgress(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Get movement progress for an entity.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.MovementExecutor.MovementState
member.summary: Internal movement state for an entity.

member.name: F:HumanFortress.Navigation.MovementStatus.PathComplete
member.summary: Path completed but not at destination.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.MoveMode
member.summary: Movement mode for pathfinding requests. Determines which capabilities are required.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavCapability
member.summary: Navigation capability bits per NAVIGATION_SPEC.md section 3.1. Packed into NavMask byte per tile.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationManager
member.summary: Manages navigation data for all chunks. Creates and updates ChunkNavData during RebuildDerived phase.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationManager.LogCallback
member.summary: Optional logging callback (set by App layer to write to fortress_debug.log)

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationManager.GetOrCreateNavData(HumanFortress.Navigation.ChunkKey)
member.summary: Get or create navigation data for a chunk.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationManager.GetNavData(HumanFortress.Navigation.ChunkKey)
member.summary: Get navigation data for a chunk if it exists.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationManager.GetNavData(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey)
member.summary: Get navigation data for a chunk if it exists (using Simulation ChunkKey).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationManager.GetNavDataAt(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get navigation data at world coordinates.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationManager.RebuildChunkNavData(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk)
member.summary: Rebuild navigation data for a chunk (during RebuildDerived phase).

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationTuning
member.summary: Tunable navigation parameters from tuning.navigation.json. Per NAVIGATION_SPEC.md section 10.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationTuning.FluidDeepThreshold
member.summary: Fluid depth threshold for deep (blocks non-swimmers).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationTuning.FluidWadeCost
member.summary: Cost for wading through shallow fluid.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationTuning.FluidSwimCost
member.summary: Cost for swimming through deep fluid.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationTuning.DoorOpenCost
member.summary: Extra cost for passing through open doors.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationTuning.MaxNodesPerSearch
member.summary: Maximum nodes to explore per search.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationTuning.MaxMsPerTickPathing
member.summary: Maximum milliseconds per tick for pathfinding.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationTuning.RampVerticalAlignmentMode
member.summary: Vertical alignment mode for ramps. "df" by default.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationTuning.RampRequiresHighsideSupport
member.summary: Whether ascending a ramp requires high-side support (solid wall) below the top tile.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationTuning.DiagonalCornerCheck
member.summary: Apply corner-check rule for diagonal moves (2D). If true, both orthogonal adjacent tiles must be walkable.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.NavigationTuning.LoadFromContent
member.summary: Load tuning from content registries (tuning.navigation.json). Falls back to defaults.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathCache
member.summary: LRU cache for computed paths. Thread-safe for concurrent reads.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathService
member.summary: Pathfinding service per NAVIGATION_SPEC.md section 5. Manages path requests, caching, and concurrent pathfinders.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathService.Solve(HumanFortress.Navigation.PathRequest@,HumanFortress.Navigation.IWorldNavigationView@)
member.summary: Solve a path request. Called during read phase of UPDATE_ORDER.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathService.BeginTick
member.summary: Start a new tick - resets counters and processes queued requests.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathService.ProcessQueuedRequests(HumanFortress.Navigation.IWorldNavigationView)
member.summary: Process queued path requests up to time budget.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathService.InvalidateChunk(HumanFortress.Navigation.ChunkKey)
member.summary: Invalidate cache entries for a specific chunk. Called when chunk connectivity version changes.

member.name: F:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathResultKind.Partial
member.summary: Partial path found (node limit or time limit reached).

member.name: F:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathResultKind.Invalid
member.summary: Invalid request (bad coordinates, sleeping zone, etc).

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathRequest
member.summary: Immutable pathfinding request per NAVIGATION_SPEC.md section 5.4.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathRequest.#ctor(HumanFortress.Navigation.Point3,HumanFortress.Navigation.Point3,HumanFortress.Navigation.MoveMode,HumanFortress.Navigation.PathFlags,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Immutable pathfinding request per NAVIGATION_SPEC.md section 5.4.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathRequest.GetCacheKey
member.summary: Generate a deterministic hash for caching.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathNode
member.summary: A single node in a path.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathNode.#ctor(HumanFortress.Navigation.Point3,System.UInt16)
member.summary: A single node in a path.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Navigation.PathNode.ToChunkLocal
member.summary: Convert to chunk key and local index.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Navigation.WorldNavigationView
member.summary: Concrete IWorldNavigationView over Simulation.World + NavigationManager caches.
